_description: Fetch analytics for published TikTok and Instagram posts in March 2026
_notes: startDate and endDate are required (ISO 8601 UTC)
platforms and socialMediaIds are optional filters
Only returns PUBLISHED posts with a platformPostId
latestMetric is null if no metrics have been fetched yet
All metric values are strings (bigint), not numbers
Supported platforms: Facebook, Instagram, Threads, LinkedIn, TikTok only
No pagination - keep date ranges reasonable
